calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2015 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Deborah A. Hedley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, US CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ENVIROENERGY, LLC, a Tennessee limitedliability company and ANCHOR HOLDINGS, LLC, a Tennessee limited liability company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $335,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $335,000.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
